heading: Required Access
body:
You must have the [Project Search Index Editor](<Project Search Index Editor>) or higher role to
delete a MongoDB Vector Search index.

> **Note:** You can use the [mongosh](mongodb-shell) command or driver helper methods to delete
> MongoDB Vector Search indexes on all Atlas cluster tiers. For a list of supported driver
> versions, see Supported Clients.

You need [readWrite](manual/reference/built-in-roles) or higher role to delete MongoDB Vector Search indexes.
